name: Bouillabaisse Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Skewer 1 shrimp and 1 scallop on 8-inch bamboo skewers, wrapping the tail of each shrimp around its corresponding scallop.
2. In a saucepan, mix together tomato sauce, minced clams, Pernod, minced garlic, bay leaf, basil, salt, pepper, and saffron.
3. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
4. Arrange the skewered fish in a shallow baking dish.
5. Drizzle the prepared sauce over the skewers.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
